location.p:
Edinburgh is Scotland's primary centre for executive search and one of the most active senior talent markets in the UK outside London. The city's strength in financial services — encompassing life insurance, investment management, banking, and fintech — creates sustained and often highly specialised demand for senior leadership talent. Edinburgh is also home to a growing technology sector, significant public sector organisations, and a vibrant professional services community.

The Scottish executive talent market has distinct characteristics. It is geographically compact — most senior executives in Edinburgh know each other — which creates strong informal networks but also means that confidentiality requires particularly careful management. Compensation levels are somewhat lower than equivalent London roles, though the gap has narrowed in recent years as digital businesses and financial services firms compete globally for talent.
location.roles: CEO, Chief Investment Officer, MD, Head of Compliance, CFO, Head of Risk, Technology Director, HR Director, Commercial Director, Head of Wealth Management
